texto: I have no ambitions at all! I have none... seriously. I want to be a good father. I want to be a good husband. I want to be a good son, a good brother, a good family member. I don't have any ambition to direct a film or write a play. I like acting.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pilou Asbaek: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I have no ambitions at all! I have none... seriously. I want to be a good father. I want to be a …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, good, father pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de father e son.
